summary: Reposted local television news package from a Fox affiliate in Atlanta (Fox 5 / Fox Local). The screen is a split layout: a still photo of a woman jogging on a wooded trail on the left, and on the right, footage of uniformed police officers working a taped-off outdoor crime scene with a residential mailbox and patrol cars. Later frames cut to a separate shot of officers at a strip-mall parking lot behind crime-scene tape, then to a seated woman speaking in an outdoor interview against a brick wall. Lower-third chyrons read phrases such as 'ONE MAN IS IN' and 'BROOKHAVEN POLICE,' with station bugs reading 'FOX LOCAL' and 'FOX 5' and an on-screen clock and temperature. The audio is a reporter narrating the case followed by the interview subject. There is no music bed.

script.scene: Split screen: still photo of a woman in a green top and red leggings jogging on a leaf-covered trail at left; at right, two officers behind crime-scene tape near a mailbox and a patrol car, chyron 'ONE MAN IS IN.'
Right panel shows officers walking through a strip-mall parking lot behind yellow tape with marked SUVs; chyron 'BROOKHAVEN POLICE,' station clock reads 10:02 PM, 72 degrees.
Outdoor interview of a seated woman against a brick wall, captioned 'TRY TO DO WHAT I CAN,' with the jogger photo still inset at upper left.
